References

Reference material for the Faber language: formal grammar, design documents, and repository index.

EBNF grammar

The formal grammar for Faber syntax. Every production rule with annotations. [Read more →](/references/ebnf.html)

Design documents

Architecture decisions, deferred feature tracking, and design rationale. [Read more →](/references/design-docs.html)

Repositories

The faberlang organization: compiler (radix), CLI (faber), runtime (faber-runtime), package manager (cista), stdlib (norma), and graphics (triga). [Read more →](/references/repositories.html)
